---
title: "Untitled"
output: html_document
---

## Conections between species and metabolites

```{R}
# Try to get CID from compound name
# If not possible, try to get CID from SID
# Param - name: compound name (character)
# Return - compound_cid: CID (integer)
library(httr2)

get_cid <- function(name) {
  if (is.na(name) || name == "") return(NA)
  
  encoded_name <- URLencode(name, reserved = TRUE)
  
  # 1. Try direct Compound Name -> CID
  url_cid <- paste0("https://pubchem.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/rest/pug/compound/name/", 
                    encoded_name, "/cids/JSON")
  
  response_cid <- tryCatch({
    req <- request(url_cid) |> req_retry(max_tries = 3) |> req_perform()
    if (resp_status(req) == 200) {
      data <- resp_body_json(req)
      return(data$IdentifierList$CID[[1]])
    }
    NA
  }, error = function(e) NA)
  
  if (!is.na(response_cid)) {
    message(paste0("Found CID for ", name, ": ", response_cid))
    return(response_cid)
  }

  Sys.sleep(0.2) # Short pause
  
  # 2. Try Substance Name -> SID
  url_sid <- paste0("https://pubchem.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/rest/pug/substance/name/", 
                    encoded_name, "/sids/JSON")
  
  sid <- tryCatch({
    req <- request(url_sid) |> req_perform()
    if (resp_status(req) == 200) {
      data <- resp_body_json(req)
      return(data$IdentifierList$SID[[1]])
    }
    NA
  }, error = function(e) NA)

  # 3. If SID exists, find the linked CID
  if (!is.na(sid)) {
    url_sid_to_cid <- paste0("https://pubchem.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/rest/pug/substance/sid/", 
                             sid, "/cids/JSON")
    
    final_cid <- tryCatch({
      req <- request(url_sid_to_cid) |> req_perform()
      if (resp_status(req) == 200) {
        data <- resp_body_json(req)
        # SIDs can map to multiple CIDs; we take the first
        return(data$IdentifierList$CID[[1]])
      }
      NA
    }, error = function(e) NA)
    
    if (!is.na(final_cid)) {
      message(paste0("Found CID via SID for ", name, ": ", final_cid))
      return(final_cid)
    }
  }
  
  message(paste0("Could not find CID for ", name))
  return(NA)
}
```

```{R}
library(stringr)
library(dplyr)
load("~/Documents/vitoria/usp-masters/data/gutmgene/gutmgene1_beforemerging.RData")

gutmgene_species <- gutmgene1 %>%
                        mutate(Microbe_Species = word(Gut_Microbe_Name, 1))

gutmgene_species$Microbe_Species <- str_remove_all(gutmgene_species$Microbe_Species, "\\[|\\]")

get_cid_vec <- Vectorize(get_cid)
gutmgene_species <- gutmgene_species %>%
  mutate(
    Metabolite_CID = get_cid_vec(Metabolite_Name) # Obtains CID for the metabolite name
  )

save(gutmgene_species, file = "data/network/gutmgene_processed.RData")

```

```{R}
missing_rows <- is.na(gutmgene_species$Metabolite_CID)
unique_missing_names <- unique(gutmgene_species$Metabolite_Name[missing_rows])
nocid_lookup <- paste0("nocid", seq_along(unique_missing_names))
names(nocid_lookup) <- unique_missing_names
gutmgene_species$Metabolite_CID[missing_rows] <- nocid_lookup[gutmgene_species$Metabolite_Name[missing_rows]]

edges_species_met <- data.frame(
                            Source = gutmgene_species$Microbe_Species,
                            Target = gutmgene_species$Metabolite_CID)

# Save information about species and metabolites nodes

nodes <- data.frame(name = unique(c(edges_species_met$Source, edges_species_met$Target)),
                      type = c(rep("Species", length(unique(edges_species_met$Source))), rep("Metabolite", length(unique(edges_species_met$Target)))))
```
## Conections between targets and metabolites

```{R}
load("data/network/targets_metabolites_PDE4B.RData")
library(dplyr)

edges_target_met <- data.frame(
  Source = rep("PDE4B", length(targets_to_metabolites$PDE4B)),
  Target = unlist(targets_to_metabolites$PDE4B),
  stringsAsFactors = FALSE
)


edges_target_met$Target_Name <- NULL

mets_pde4d <- unique(unlist(targets_to_metabolites$PDE4D))

edges_target_met_noPDE4D <- edges_target_met %>%
  filter(Target %in% mets_pde4d)

# Save information about gene and metabolite nodes
nodes <- rbind(nodes, data.frame(
  name = unique(c(edges_target_met$Source, edges_target_met$Target)),
  type = c(rep("Gene", length(unique(edges_target_met$Source))), rep("Metabolite", length(unique(edges_target_met$Target))))
))
```


## Connections between species and MDD

```{R}
# install.packages("jsonlite")
library(jsonlite)
library(stringr)
library(dplyr)

disbiome.JSON <- fromJSON("data/network/species_mdd.json")
disbiome_df <- as.data.frame(disbiome.JSON)
disbiome_df <- disbiome_df %>%
                        mutate(species = word(organism_name, 1))

edges_species_mdd <- data.frame(
                            Source = unique(disbiome_df$species),
                            Target = rep("MDD", length(unique(disbiome_df$species))))

# Save information about species and MDD nodes
nodes <- rbind(nodes, data.frame(
                          name = edges_species_mdd$Source,
                          type = rep("Species", length(unique(edges_species_mdd$Source)))
              ))
nodes <- rbind(nodes, data.frame(
                            name = "MDD",
                            type = "Disorder"
                        ))
```

## Conections between MDD and KEGG, and MDD and Reactome

```{R}
library(stringr)

mdd_kegg_react <- read.table("data/network/mdd_kegg_react.csv", sep = ",", header = TRUE)

mdd_kegg <- mdd_kegg_react[str_detect(mdd_kegg_react$Pathway.ID, "KEGG"),]$Pathway.ID
mdd_kegg <- toupper(str_remove(mdd_kegg, "KEGG:"))

mdd_react <- mdd_kegg_react[str_detect(mdd_kegg_react$Pathway.ID, "REACT"),]$Pathway.ID
mdd_react <- toupper(str_remove(mdd_react, "REACT:"))

edges_mdd_kegg <- data.frame(
                        Source = rep("MDD", length(mdd_kegg)),
                        Target = mdd_kegg)
edges_mdd_react <- data.frame(
                        Source = rep("MDD", length(mdd_react)),
                        Target = mdd_react)
edges_mdd_pathways <- rbind(edges_mdd_kegg, edges_mdd_react)

nodes <- rbind(nodes, data.frame(
                        name = unique(edges_mdd_pathways$Target),
                        type = rep("Pathway", length(unique(edges_mdd_pathways$Target)))
              ))
```

## Conections between genes and KEGG

```{R}
pde4b_kegg <- read.table("data/network/target_associations/pde4b_kegg.txt", sep = "\t", header = F)

edges_target_kegg <- data.frame(
                            Source = rep("PDE4B", nrow(pde4b_kegg)),
                            Target = toupper(pde4b_kegg$V1))

# Save information about KEGG pathway nodes
nodes <- rbind(nodes, data.frame(
                        name = unique(edges_target_kegg$Target),
                        type = rep("Pathway", length(unique(edges_target_kegg$Target)))
              ))
```

## Conections between genes and Reactome

```{R}
pde4b_react <- read.csv("data/network/target_associations/pde4b_react.csv", sep = ",", header = TRUE)

edges_target_react <- data.frame(
                            Source = rep("PDE4B", nrow(pde4b_react)),
                            Target = toupper(pde4b_react$Pathway.identifier))

# Save information about reactome pathway nodes
nodes <- rbind(nodes, data.frame(
                        name = unique(edges_target_react$Target),
                        type = rep("Pathway", length(unique(edges_target_react$Target)))
              ))
```

## Get all the edges and node type, clean and save

```{R}
edges <- rbind(edges_target_met, edges_target_react, edges_target_kegg, edges_mdd_pathways, edges_species_mdd, edges_species_met)
edges_clean <- distinct(edges)
nodes_clean <- distinct(nodes)
edges_clean <- edges_clean %>%
  mutate(across(everything(), ~ gsub("MDD", "TDM", .x)))

order <- c("Species", "Pathway", "Metabolite", "Gene", "Disorder")
nodes_clean <- nodes_clean %>%
  mutate(layer = as.numeric(factor(type, levels = order)))
nodes_clean$layer[nodes_clean$name == "MDD"] <- 4
nodes_clean$name[nodes_clean$name == "MDD"] <- "TDM"


# Save
write.table(edges_clean, file = "data/network/cytoscape_edges_PDE4B.tsv", row.names=FALSE, sep="\t")
write.table(nodes_clean, file = "data/network/cytoscape_nodes_PDE4B.tsv", row.names=FALSE, sep="\t")
```


```{R}
# Supondo que seus dataframes sejam:
# nodes: dataframe com colunas name, type, layer
# edges_clean: dataframe com colunas Source e Target

# 1. Função para reduzir 3/4 dos nodes de certos tipos
reduce_nodes <- function(df, types_to_reduce, keep_per_type = 10) {
  df_reduced <- df
  
  for (t in types_to_reduce) {
    nodes_t <- df[df$type == t, ]
    if (nrow(nodes_t) > keep_per_type) {
      # Mantém apenas 'keep_per_type' aleatórios
      keep_nodes <- sample(nodes_t$name, keep_per_type)
      df_reduced <- df_reduced[!(df_reduced$type == t & !(df_reduced$name %in% keep_nodes)), ]
    }
  }
  
  return(df_reduced)
}

# Tipos que queremos reduzir
types_to_reduce <- c("Metabolite", "Species", "Pathway")

nodes_reduced <- reduce_nodes(nodes_clean, types_to_reduce, keep_per_type = 50)

# 2. Filtrar as arestas mantendo só aquelas cujos nós ainda existem
edges_reduced <- edges_clean[
  edges_clean$Source %in% nodes_reduced$name &
  edges_clean$Target %in% nodes_reduced$name,
]

# Save
write.table(edges_reduced, file = "data/network/PDE4B_edges_r.tsv", row.names=FALSE, sep="\t")
write.table(nodes_reduced, file = "data/network/PDE4B_nodes_r.tsv", row.names=FALSE, sep="\t")

```
